rationale: The cited article’s focus on extrinsic cues shaping quality judgments (price-based expectations and reference dependence) is conceptually adjacent to the citing paper’s legality-to-efficacy inference mechanism. However, the evidence here is only one DOI-level reference match with no in-text citation context, and the citing note does not indicate direct use of price-quality theory. Given this limited evidence, it is not safe to drop but not strong enough to clearly keep.
